title: Solar Harness Session Event v2
description: Durable, event-sourced record for the managed-agent runtime. Each event is an immutable fact appended to the session log.

session_id.description: Durable session identifier shared by all events in one execution session

actor.description: Who produced this event (coordinator, builder, evaluator, planner, pm, runtime, human)

source.description: Subsystem or file that emitted the event

sprint_id.description: Sprint this event is scoped to; null for session-level events

activity_id.description: Stable identifier for the unit of work being tracked across command→started→result lifecycle

correlation_id.description: Groups logically related events across actors (e.g. one wake cycle)

causation_id.description: event_id of the event that directly caused this one

idempotency_key.description: If set, duplicate events with the same key are suppressed; enables at-least-once delivery without duplicate side effects
